title: Numbers Mixed With Text
description: Numbers embedded in real sentences — addresses, dates, quantities, references.

drills.content: The package weighs 3.7 kg and ships from warehouse 14 by January 20, 2025.
Order #82914 is split across 2 boxes: 6 items in box A, 11 items in box B.
He ran 5 km in 24:08, beating his previous best of 25:42 by 94 seconds.
